news.t: Direxion Announces Forward and Reverse Splits of Four ETFs
Here's How to Play Range-Bound Regional Banking ETFs

holdings.infoBox: DPST is an equity ETF with a total of 166 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Regional Banks Bull 3X ETF (DPST) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Regional Banks Select Industry index. The fund provides 3x leveraged exposure to an equally-weighted index of US regional banking stocks. DPST was launched on Aug 19, 2015 and is issued by Direxion.
